notes: FARTCOIN Oct 2025 Volume Absorption Reversal. +54% in 48h from climax low.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Oct 10 21:00 UTC — vol=9.5x avg (open 0.5055 → close 0.4056, -19.8%).
Context: broad crypto market crash event (BTC, ETH, alts all hit simultaneously).
ABSORPTION: Oct 11-12, price stabilises 0.33-0.39, volume declines to 30-50M/h.
DELTA_FLIP: Oct 12 12:00-15:00, tbv_ratio crosses 0.55+ after sustained sub-0.50 window.
MARKUP: Oct 12 14:00-17:00, vol spike to 90-150M/h, price reclaims 0.38-0.45 range (+20% in 4h).
Total recovery by Oct 25: 0.38 → follow-through rally confirms pattern completion.
1000PEPE Oct 2025 VAR — same macro crash event as FARTCOIN reference, different asset.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Oct 10 21:00 UTC — vol=10.0x avg (open 0.00812 → close 0.00682, -16.1%).
Cross-asset validation: tests pattern fires on high-liquidity meme token vs FARTCOIN.
Lower mcap / higher liquidity than FARTCOIN — expected slightly faster delta flip recovery.
Holdout: confirms pattern is not overfitted to single asset within same market event.
1000BONK Jan 2024 VAR — early bull market meme correction. +26% in 120h from climax.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Jan 3 12:00 UTC — vol=9.8x avg (open 0.01318 → close 0.01196, -9.2%).
Context: BONK had run up 300%+ since Nov 2023 launch; sharp profit-taking event.
ABSORPTION: Jan 3-7, price holds 0.011-0.012 with volume declining (0.3-1x avg).
DELTA_FLIP: Jan 4-5, tbv_ratio begins sustained move above 0.50 while prior window was sub-0.50.
MARKUP: Jan 8-10, vol spike to 5.8x avg on Jan 8 19:00, price reclaims 0.012 → 0.015 (+26%).
Temporal holdout: tests VAR 18 months before the reference case (different market phase).
1000PEPE Nov 2025 VAR — smaller climax (7x vol, -6.2%), tests lower-threshold detection.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Nov 3 15:00 UTC — vol=7.0x avg (open 0.006122 → close 0.005743, -6.2%).
Smaller climax magnitude vs Oct 2025 case — validates pattern fires on moderate events.
Different time period from Oct 2025 cases — tests temporal generality (same asset, different event).
Holdout: if pattern fires here, confirms it's not just catching extreme 10x+ events.

_notes: 5th pattern. Pure OHLCV + taker buy volume — no perp OI/funding required. Detects selling climax → CVD delta flip → base formation → breakout. Mechanically distinct from TRADOOR (OI-driven), FFR (funding-driven), WSR (price-action spring), WHALE (accumulation). Spot-compatible. 4 cases: 1 reference + 3 holdouts across 3 different time periods and 2 assets.
